content: LLM vision API timeout strategy: implement hard timeout (10s for receipt OCR, 15s for AI insight per API_CONTRACT.md). Fallback chain: primary LLM -> cheaper model -> manual input prompt. Circuit breaker pattern: 5 failures opens circuit, 60s cooldown, routes to fallback. Graceful degradation: always show manual input option when AI fails - never block user. For demo risk: pre-warm API with test request before demo, have manual entry ready as backup. Different model outputs may break JSON parsers - always validate response schema.
